channel.title: Cybersecurity News Aggregator
channel.description: Latest cybersecurity news from top sources
channel.comment: News aggregated from: Cointelegraph - Security, Threatpost, Bleeping Computer, Dark Reading, Blockthreat, CryptoPotato, CryptoSlate, Krebs On Security, The Hacker News, Coindesk, GroupIB Blog, Data Breach Today, CNN.com - Crypto News, DataBreaches.net

item.title: Request Network Introduces One-Click Cross-Chain Mass Payouts and Expands Wallet Screening With Merkle Science
item.description: [PRESS RELEASE – Zug, Switzerland, June 25th, 2026] Anyone can now execute mass payouts across EVM chains and Tron from a single platform and can choose between multiple wallet screening providers. Ju...

item.title: MemeCore's M token suddenly crashes 80% with no clear trigger

item.title: Malicious npm Packages Pose as PostCSS Tools to Deliver Windows RAT
item.description:
Cybersecurity researchers have discovered a set of malicious npm packages that are designed to deliver a Windows-based remote access trojan (RAT).
The list of identified packages, is below -
aes-...
